inputs.label: Base Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The standard price per unit before any bulk discount is applied.

inputs.label: Quantity Ordered
inputs.businessContext: The total number of units being purchased in a single order.

inputs.label: Maximum Discount
inputs.businessContext: The upper limit of the discount percentage achievable with very large orders.

inputs.label: Discount Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: The quantity at which the discount reaches approximately 63% of the maximum discount (i.e., the e-folding scale).
